member.name: T:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Hands-On 5 – JWT Authentication. Issues a signed JWT token valid for 10 minutes.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

member.name: T:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController
member.summary: Hands-On 2-5 – Employee CRUD API. Route changed from api/[controller] to api/Emp (Hands-On 2). Protected by JWT [Authorize] (Hands-On 5).

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single employee by ID.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.Create(Week5_WebAPI.Models.Employee)
member.summary: Creates a new employee. Requires Admin role.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.Update(System.Int32,Week5_WebAPI.Models.Employee)
member.summary: Updates an existing employee. Requires Admin role.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an employee by ID. Requires Admin role.

member.name: T:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.ValuesController
member.summary: Hands-On 1 – Basic Web API demonstrating REST verbs and HTTP status codes.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.ValuesController.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single value by index. HTTP 200 or 404.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.ValuesController.Post(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new value. HTTP 201 Created.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.ValuesController.Put(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Updates an existing value by index. HTTP 200 or 400.

member.name: M:Week5_WebAPI.Controllers.ValuesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a value by index. HTTP 204 No Content or 400.

member.name: T:Week5_WebAPI.Filters.CustomAuthFilter
member.summary: Action filter that validates the Authorization header contains a Bearer token. Returns HTTP 400 if the header is missing or malformed.

member.name: T:Week5_WebAPI.Filters.CustomExceptionFilter
member.summary: Global exception filter. Logs unhandled exceptions to Logs/error.txt and returns HTTP 500 with a safe error message.

member.name: P:Week5_WebAPI.Models.Employee.Permanent
member.summary: Indicates whether the employee is permanent.

member.name: P:Week5_WebAPI.Models.Employee.Skills
member.summary: List of skills the employee possesses.
